name: my-claude-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Java/Spring Boot code-review orchestrator. Reviews local branch diffs vs main and GitHub PRs by dispatching parallel sub-skill checks (relational-db, mongo-as-logging, redis, rabbitmq, transactional-faults, race-conditions, spring-framework, security, performance, error-handling+disk-writes, test-coverage, code-quality, config-dependencies) and produces line-anchored findings.
